design_principles: Only include high-confidence attachable fields for v0 course enrichment.
Require canonical anchor via unique strict match class before any publish candidate is emitted.
Keep risky fields internal until extractor quality and policy are tightened.

anchor_provenance.source_title: guide course title used for match

publishable_now.guide_description_candidates: List of guide descriptions from uniquely anchored occurrences.
publishable_now.guide_competency_bullets: List of competency bullets from uniquely anchored occurrences.
publishable_now.aos_role_context: AoS group labels and per-program role context where course appears.
publishable_now.program_appearance_context: Program/family appearance metadata for anchored occurrences.

publish_later_or_internal.sp_sequence_context: Useful but degree-context-heavy; keep optional and explicitly contextualized.
publish_later_or_internal.certification_relationships: Internal or gated-only until cert noise filtering + claim policy are finalized.
publish_later_or_internal.prerequisite_relationships: Internal-only until dedicated dependency extraction and validation pass.

gating_rules: Do not emit course payload for ambiguous or unmapped anchor classes.
Treat dual-track and SP-caveat guides according to existing partial-use policy.
Do not emit raw cert/prereq strings to public payload.

deferred_or_excluded_fields.reason: mixed signal quality and parser-noise contamination
fragmentary extracted text and context dependence

deferred_or_excluded_fields.field: course-level SP term/CU as canonical attributes

additional_work_before_course_page_imple: Deterministic disambiguation policy for ambiguous titles (program/family context rules).
Unmapped-title triage and canonical alias curation where appropriate.
Certification claim policy + extractor hardening to isolate explicit prep/alignment statements.
Prerequisite extractor redesign if public dependency display is desired.
